content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.hackathon.farsight_protocol
FILE: cosmos/integration/hackathon/farsight_protocol.py (496 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: FARSIGHT PROTOCOL - Cosmos's Ultimate Prediction & Intelligence System

Combines:
- Swarm Oracle (11-agent deliberation consensus)
- Polymarket Analysis (real prediction market data)
- Quantum Randomness (IBM Quantum API for true entropy)
- Monte Carlo Simulation (scenario modeling)
- Visual Prophec

CLASSES:
- FarsightPrediction: A prediction from the Farsight Protocol.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- FarsightProtocol: The Farsight Protocol - Cosmos's ultimate prediction system.

Combines multiple 
  Methods: async def predict(self, question: str, category: str='general', include_visual: bool=True, include_q
  Methods: async def analyze_token(self, token_address: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def get_prediction(self, prediction_id: str) -> Optional[FarsightPrediction]
  Methods: def get_recent_predictions(self, limit: int=10) -> List[FarsightPrediction]
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_farsight() -> FarsightProtocol
- async def farsight_predict(question: str, category: str='general') -> Dict[str, Any]
- async def farsight_crypto(token: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
